title: Removed non-engineering items R-12, R-13, TV-10 from plan
content: Admiral directed removal of three non-engineering items from the implementation plan: R-12 (Open-Source Community Strategy), R-13 (Academic Research Positioning), and TV-10 (Community feedback collection). These were community/academic/strategy tasks, not engineering work. They inflated the implementation plan item count without contributing to code-to-spec ratio. They should NOT be re-added to the plan. If community strategy, academic positioning, or feedback collection becomes relevant in the future, it should be tracked outside the engineering plan.

metadata.rationale: Non-engineering items do not belong in the implementation plan
